subject: WM-0124 review: changes_requested
body: High: required-locale probes for missing Chinese and missing en now fail closed, but legacy zh compatibility is not scoped to protected M5 fixtures; validateM5ContentPack still accepts manifest.locales=[en,zh-CN] with only locales/zh.json and no zh-CN file, allowing new M8 packs to bypass canonical zh-CN resources. Required gates passed.
